name: Kang Yong Electric Public Company Limited
summary: Kang Yong Electric Public Company Limited manufactures and distributes household electrical appliances in Thailand, Japan, and internationally. The company offers home electrical appliances, such as refrigerators, electric fans, ventilating fans, water pumps, and jet towels under the Mitsubishi Electric name. It also exports its products to approximately 20 countries. The company was formerly known as Kang Yong Electric Manufacturing Co., Ltd. Kang Yong Electric Public Company Limited was founded in 1964 and is based in Bang Phli, Thailand.
